title.en: Locking the Air: CCM for Piconets and GCM for Pairnets
title.zh: 锁住空中数据：微微网的 CCM 与对网的 GCM

blocks.en: A wireless frame travels through open air, so anyone with a radio can listen or tamper. IEEE Std 802.15.3-2023 protects frames with symmetric-key cryptography — the same secret key both encrypts on the sender and decrypts on the receiver. The standard uses two cousin algorithms: piconets (a small network coordinated by one device, the PNC) use CCM, while pairnets (a tight link between exactly two devices, a DEV pair) use GCM. Both deliver the same three guarantees: confidentiality (an eavesdropper learns nothing), authentication (you know who sent it), and integrity (you detect any bit-flip). Clause 9 specifies CCM for piconets; Clause 10 specifies GCM for pairnets.
blocks.zh: 无线帧在开放的空中传播，任何带收发机的人都能窃听或篡改。IEEE Std 802.15.3-2023 用对称密钥密码学保护帧——同一把密钥在发送端加密、在接收端解密。标准采用两种同源算法：微微网（由单一设备 PNC 协调的小型网络）使用 CCM，对网（恰好两台设备 DEV 之间的紧密链路）使用 GCM。两者提供相同的三项保证：保密性（窃听者一无所获）、认证（确认发送者身份）、完整性（检测任何比特翻转）。Clause 9 为微微网规定 CCM，Clause 10 为对网规定 GCM。

blocks.en: Both clauses run only in mode 1 (the secure mode defined in 8.2); mode 0 has no symmetric-key security at all. This is stated identically in 9.1 (piconets) and 10.1 (pairnets) — security is an explicit operating mode, not something layered on top of every frame by default.
blocks.zh: 两个 Clause 都只在模式 1（在 8.2 中定义的安全模式）下运行；模式 0 完全没有对称密钥安全。9.1（微微网）与 10.1（对网）的表述完全一致——安全是一种明确的工作模式，而非默认叠加到每一帧上的功能。

blocks.en: Both algorithms are AEAD — Authenticated Encryption with Associated Data. AEAD splits a frame into two regions. One region (the payload) gets encrypted and authenticated; the other region (headers and context) is only authenticated, never hidden, because the radio needs to read it in the clear to route the frame. The standard calls the second region additional authenticated data (AAD). The output is the ciphertext plus a short integrity code (also called a tag): a fingerprint that changes if even one bit of either region is altered. The 'building blocks' subclauses (9.2 for CCM, 10.2 for GCM) name the cipher, the tag size, and the nonce; the 'implementation' subclauses (9.3, 10.3) map those abstractions onto real frame fields.
blocks.zh: 两种算法都属于 AEAD——带关联数据的认证加密。AEAD 把一帧分成两个区域：一个区域（载荷）被加密并认证；另一个区域（帧头与上下文）只认证、绝不隐藏，因为收发机需要明文读取它以转发帧。标准把第二个区域称作附加认证数据（AAD）。输出是密文加一段短小的完整性码（也叫标签）：只要任一区域有一个比特被改动，这枚指纹就会变化。“构建模块”子条款（CCM 见 9.2，GCM 见 10.2）规定密码、标签长度与随机数；“实现”子条款（9.3、10.3）把这些抽象映射到真实的帧字段上。

blocks.en: The heart of safe symmetric encryption is the nonce — a 'number used once'. Reusing a nonce with the same key catastrophically breaks both CCM and GCM, leaking plaintext and forgery power. So both clauses build the nonce from values guaranteed never to repeat. For CCM (9.2.4) the nonce packs the source ID, destination ID, a per-superframe Time Token, a Secure Frame Counter (SFC), and fragmentation control; an aggregated frame adds a Secure Subframe Counter and 0xCFCF padding. For GCM (10.2.4) the 12-octet nonce is simply the source DEV's globally unique 6-octet address followed by its 6-octet SFC. In both, every retransmission must increment the SFC so a re-sent frame never reuses a nonce.
blocks.zh: 安全对称加密的核心是随机数 nonce——“仅用一次的数”。在同一把密钥下重用随机数会灾难性地破坏 CCM 与 GCM，泄露明文并赋予伪造能力。因此两个 Clause 都用保证永不重复的值来构造随机数。CCM（9.2.4）的随机数拼装源 ID、目的 ID、每超帧的时间令牌、安全帧计数器（SFC）以及分片控制；聚合帧再加上安全子帧计数器和 0xCFCF 填充。GCM（10.2.4）的 12 字节随机数则直接是源 DEV 全球唯一的 6 字节地址后接其 6 字节 SFC。两者中每次重传都必须递增 SFC，使重发的帧绝不重用随机数。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="6" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">CCM nonce (piconet, 9.2.4)</text><rect x="6" y="24" width="40" height="30"/><rect x="46" y="24" width="40" height="30"/><rect x="86" y="24" width="120" height="30"/><rect x="206" y="24" width="60" height="30"/><rect x="266" y="24" width="70" height="30"/><text x="10" y="43" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">SrcID</text><text x="50" y="43" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">DestID</text><text x="110" y="43" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Time Token</text><text x="212" y="43" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">SFC</text><text x="270" y="43" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">FragCtrl</text><text x="6" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">GCM nonce (pairnet, 10.2.4)</text><rect x="6" y="104" width="160" height="30"/><rect x="166" y="104" width="160" height="30"/><text x="30" y="123" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">src DEV address (6 oct)</text><text x="200" y="123" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">SFC (6 oct)</text></svg>

caption.en: Two nonce layouts. CCM (top) combines several IDs, the per-superframe Time Token, and counters; GCM (bottom) is just the globally unique source address plus the Secure Frame Counter (SFC). Both ensure no nonce repeats under one key.
caption.zh: 两种随机数布局。CCM（上）组合多个 ID、每超帧的时间令牌与计数器；GCM（下）只是全球唯一的源地址加安全帧计数器（SFC）。两者都确保同一密钥下随机数不重复。

blocks.en: Inside CCM (Clause 9.4) the cipher is AES with 128-bit keys and 128-bit blocks (9.2.5). CCM does two passes. First, data authentication (9.4.3) runs CBC-MAC — cipher block chaining message authentication code: it lays out blocks B0, B1, … (B0 holds the flags, nonce, and message length), then chains each block through AES, XORing into a running value, and takes the first M octets as the raw tag T. Here M is the tag size and L is how many octets encode the message length; 802.15.3 fixes M=8 and L=2 (9.2.3). Second, encryption (9.4.4) runs AES in counter (CTR) mode: it builds counter blocks A0, A1, …, encrypts each to a key-stream block Si, and XORs the key stream onto the plaintext. The tag is masked by encrypting it with S0. The output (9.4.5) is the ciphertext followed by that encrypted tag.
blocks.zh: CCM 内部（Clause 9.4）的密码是 128 位密钥、128 位分组的 AES（9.2.5）。CCM 做两遍处理。第一遍是数据认证（9.4.3），运行 CBC-MAC——密码分组链接消息认证码：它排布出 B0、B1……（B0 含标志、随机数与消息长度），将每个分组依次穿过 AES，XOR 进一个滚动值，取前 M 字节作为原始标签 T。此处 M 是标签长度，L 是编码消息长度所用的字节数；802.15.3 固定 M=8、L=2（9.2.3）。第二遍是加密（9.4.4），运行 AES 计数器（CTR）模式：构造计数器块 A0、A1……，将每个加密为密钥流块 Si，再把密钥流 XOR 到明文上。标签由 S0 加密以遮蔽。输出（9.4.5）是密文后接这枚加密标签。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  N[Nonce + flags] --> B0[B0 block]
  B0 --> CBC[CBC-MAC chain through AES]
  AAD[AAD blocks] --> CBC
  MSG[Message blocks] --> CBC
  CBC --> T[Raw tag T]
  CTR[CTR key stream S1..Sn] --> X[XOR with plaintext]
  MSG --> X
  X --> C[Ciphertext]
  T --> U[Encrypt T with S0]
  U --> OUT[Output: ciphertext + tag]
  C --> OUT
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  N[随机数+标志] --> B0[B0 分组]
  B0 --> CBC[CBC-MAC 经 AES 链接]
  AAD[AAD 分组] --> CBC
  MSG[消息分组] --> CBC
  CBC --> T[原始标签 T]
  CTR[CTR 密钥流 S1..Sn] --> X[与明文异或]
  MSG --> X
  X --> C[密文]
  T --> U[用 S0 加密 T]
  U --> OUT[输出: 密文+标签]
  C --> OUT

blocks.en: GCM (Clause 10.4) reaches the same goal by a faster route. It also uses AES — but only AES-128, mandated for pairnets (10.2.5) — and combines GCTR (counter-mode confidentiality) with GHASH (a keyed hash over the binary Galois field GF(2^128) for integrity). The hash subkey H is AES of an all-zero block; the 12-octet nonce becomes the initial counter Y0 (10.4.3). Encryption (10.4.3) XORs each plaintext block Pi with E(K, Yi); the integrity code T is GHASH over the AAD and ciphertext, masked by E(K, Y0). GCM's win is that GHASH is parallelizable, so high-throughput hardware can authenticate and encrypt at once. The tag here is a full 16 octets (10.2.3). Outputs (10.4.4) are the ciphertext, exactly as long as the plaintext, plus the 16-octet integrity code.
blocks.zh: GCM（Clause 10.4）用更快的路径达到同样目标。它也用 AES——但对网强制只用 AES-128（10.2.5）——并把 GCTR（计数器模式保密）与 GHASH（在二元伽罗瓦域 GF(2^128) 上、用于完整性的带密钥哈希）结合。哈希子密钥 H 是对全零分组做 AES；12 字节随机数成为初始计数器 Y0（10.4.3）。加密（10.4.3）把每个明文分组 Pi 与 E(K, Yi) 异或；完整性码 T 是对 AAD 与密文做 GHASH，再用 E(K, Y0) 遮蔽。GCM 的优势在于 GHASH 可并行，因此高吞吐硬件能同时认证与加密。这里的标签是完整的 16 字节（10.2.3）。输出（10.4.4）是与明文等长的密文，加上 16 字节的完整性码。

blocks.en: Decryption is unforgiving in both modes. CCM (9.4.6) and GCM (10.4.6) recompute the tag and compare it to the received one. If it fails to match, the receiver must reveal nothing — not the plaintext, not the tag, only the bare fact that verification failed. This 'verify before release' rule is what makes the integrity code a real defense rather than a hint.
blocks.zh: 两种模式的解密都毫不留情。CCM（9.4.6）与 GCM（10.4.6）重新计算标签并与收到的比对。若不匹配，接收方必须什么都不透露——不透露明文、不透露标签，只透露“验证失败”这个赤裸事实。这条“先验证后释放”的规则，正是让完整性码成为真正防线而非提示的原因。

blocks.en: Two practical limits round out both clauses. First, a key wears out: CCM (9.4.7) caps total block-cipher operations at 2^61 (about 2^64 octets) per key, while GCM (10.4.7) caps the number of encryptions at 2^48 per key — exceed it and nonce/tag guarantees erode. Second, freshness: GCM (10.4.7) explicitly requires the receiver to use the SFC (and the Time Token for beacons) to detect and discard replayed frames, where an attacker re-sends a valid old frame. The symbol tables (9.4.8 for CCM, 10.4.8 for GCM) are the glossary tying every letter — K, N, M, L, T, H, Yi — back to its role, so an implementer can read the equations unambiguously.
blocks.zh: 两个 Clause 还各以两条实用限制收尾。其一，密钥会“磨损”：CCM（9.4.7）把每把密钥的分组密码运算总数上限定为 2^61（约 2^64 字节），GCM（10.4.7）则把每把密钥的加密次数上限定为 2^48——超出后随机数/标签的保证就会瓦解。其二，新鲜性：GCM（10.4.7）明确要求接收方用 SFC（信标还要用时间令牌）来检测并丢弃重放帧——即攻击者重发一个有效旧帧的攻击。符号表（CCM 见 9.4.8，GCM 见 10.4.8）是把每个字母——K、N、M、L、T、H、Yi——对应回其角色的术语表，让实现者能无歧义地读懂这些方程。

blocks.en: PICONETS / CCM. 9.1 Modes for security: symmetric ops run in mode 1 only. 9.2 building blocks — 9.2.1 notational conventions (byte/bit ordering MSB-first, the || concatenation operator); 9.2.2 CCM combined encryption + data authentication (CBC-MAC tag, then CTR encryption); 9.2.3 CCM parameters (M=8-octet tag, L=2-octet length, AES per 9.2.5); 9.2.4 nonce value (SrcID, DestID, Time Token, SFC, frag control; aggregated adds Secure Subframe Counter + 0xCFCF padding); 9.2.5 AES encryption (FIPS 197, 128-bit key/block). 9.3 implementation — 9.3.1 data formats (Table 9-1: encrypted key, integrity code, encrypted data); 9.3.2 cryptographic operations (Auth/Enc Data Length per frame type: beacon, command, data, multi-protocol data). 9.4 CCM mode — 9.4.1 general (M and L parameter trade-offs); 9.4.2 inputs (K, nonce N of 15-L octets, message m, AAD a); 9.4.3 data authentication (B0 = Flags||Nonce||l(m), CBC-MAC X chain, T = first M octets); 9.4.4 encryption (CTR blocks Ai, key stream Si, U = T XOR first-M(S0)); 9.4.5 output (ciphertext + encrypted tag U); 9.4.6 decryption (recompute, verify, reveal nothing on failure); 9.4.7 restrictions (<=2^61 block ops/key, verify CBC-MAC first); 9.4.8 list of symbols (Table 9-5). PAIRNETS / GCM. 10.1 Modes for security: mode 1 only. 10.2 building blocks — 10.2.1 notational conventions; 10.2.2 GCM combined encryption + data authentication (GCTR + GHASH; SFC/Time Token give replay freshness; NIST SP 800-38D); 10.2.3 GCM parameters (16-octet integrity code, 12-octet nonce); 10.2.4 nonce value (source DEV address || SFC; increment SFC per retransmission); 10.2.5 AES encryption (AES-128 only, FIPS 197). 10.3 implementation — 10.3.1 data formats (Table 10-1); 10.3.2 cryptographic operations (per-subframe Auth/Enc Data Lengths for beacon, command, data, multi-protocol data). 10.4 GCM mode — 10.4.1 general; 10.4.2 inputs for authenticated encryption (K 16 oct, N 12 oct, p, AAD a); 10.4.3 authenticated encryption (Pi blocks, H = E(K,0^128), Y0 = IV||0^31||1, Ci = Pi XOR E(K,Yi), GHASH/Galois multiply with f = 1+a+a^2+a^7+a^128); 10.4.4 outputs (ciphertext c, 16-octet T); 10.4.5 inputs for authenticated decryption (K, N, a, c, T); 10.4.6 authenticated decryption (hash/encrypt order reversed, compare T' to T); 10.4.7 restrictions (<=2^48 encryptions/key, verify before release, replay detection via SFC/Time Token); 10.4.8 list of symbols (Table 10-3).
blocks.zh: 微微网 / CCM。9.1 安全模式：对称操作仅在模式 1 运行。9.2 构建模块——9.2.1 记法约定（字节/比特序为 MSB 优先，|| 连接运算符）；9.2.2 CCM 加密+数据认证合一（先 CBC-MAC 出标签，再 CTR 加密）；9.2.3 CCM 参数（M=8 字节标签、L=2 字节长度、AES 见 9.2.5）；9.2.4 随机数值（SrcID、DestID、时间令牌、SFC、分片控制；聚合帧加安全子帧计数器+0xCFCF 填充）；9.2.5 AES 加密（FIPS 197，128 位密钥/分组）。9.3 实现——9.3.1 数据格式（表 9-1：加密密钥、完整性码、加密数据）；9.3.2 密码操作（按帧类型设认证/加密数据长度：信标、命令、数据、多协议数据）。9.4 CCM 模式——9.4.1 概述（M、L 参数权衡）；9.4.2 输入（K、15-L 字节随机数 N、消息 m、AAD a）；9.4.3 数据认证（B0=Flags||Nonce||l(m)，CBC-MAC 的 X 链，T 取前 M 字节）；9.4.4 加密（CTR 块 Ai、密钥流 Si、U=T XOR first-M(S0)）；9.4.5 输出（密文+加密标签 U）；9.4.6 解密（重算、验证、失败不透露任何信息）；9.4.7 限制（每密钥 <=2^61 分组运算，先验证 CBC-MAC）；9.4.8 符号表（表 9-5）。对网 / GCM。10.1 安全模式：仅模式 1。10.2 构建模块——10.2.1 记法约定；10.2.2 GCM 加密+数据认证合一（GCTR+GHASH；SFC/时间令牌提供防重放新鲜性；NIST SP 800-38D）；10.2.3 GCM 参数（16 字节完整性码、12 字节随机数）；10.2.4 随机数值（源 DEV 地址 || SFC；每次重传递增 SFC）；10.2.5 AES 加密（仅 AES-128，FIPS 197）。10.3 实现——10.3.1 数据格式（表 10-1）；10.3.2 密码操作（信标、命令、数据、多协议数据的逐子帧认证/加密数据长度）。10.4 GCM 模式——10.4.1 概述；10.4.2 认证加密输入（K 16 字节、N 12 字节、p、AAD a）；10.4.3 认证加密（Pi 分组、H=E(K,0^128)、Y0=IV||0^31||1、Ci=Pi XOR E(K,Yi)、用 f=1+a+a^2+a^7+a^128 的 GHASH/伽罗瓦乘法）；10.4.4 输出（密文 c、16 字节 T）；10.4.5 认证解密输入（K、N、a、c、T）；10.4.6 认证解密（哈希/加密顺序对调，比对 T' 与 T）；10.4.7 限制（每密钥 <=2^48 次加密、释放前验证、用 SFC/时间令牌检测重放）；10.4.8 符号表（表 10-3）。

cites.note: Clause 9 — piconet security: modes (9.1), building blocks/nonce/AES (9.2), implementation (9.3), CCM mode equations and symbol table (9.4).
Clause 10 — pairnet security: modes (10.1), GCM building blocks/nonce/AES-128 (10.2), implementation (10.3), GCM mode equations, GHASH, restrictions, symbol table (10.4).
